headline: Public reports board added
message: Bug reports and suggestions can now be viewed, searched, filtered, and prioritized by GitHub thumbs-up reactions.

items.title: Public reports and votes tab
items.summary: Added a public Reports / votes tab that reads GitHub Issues.
items.resolution: Users can search bugs/suggestions, filter open/closed reports, and use GitHub thumbs-up reactions as priority votes.

items.title: Official maintainer status clarified
items.summary: Feedback reports are public discussion, but final answers are only official when published by the maintainer.
items.resolution: The Status / updates panel is the official notification channel for fixed, done, changed, or declined reports.

items.title: Feedback panel added
items.summary: Added a Feedback button for bug reports, suggestions, and update status.
items.resolution: Users can copy a formatted report or open a prefilled GitHub issue.

items.title: Diagram viewer was annoying to view
items.summary: Added zoom/pan controls for the gtnh-flow viewer.
items.resolution: Implemented with viewer-local zoom controls instead of resizing the whole page.

items.title: Planner filters were too vague
items.summary: Planner filter wording was expanded with explanations.
items.resolution: Changed checkbox labels and grouped free inputs separately from recursive expansion options.
